items.title_en: Largest U.S. power grid PJM escalates emergency actions to avoid blackouts
items.title_zh: 美国最大电网 PJM 升级紧急行动以避免停电
items.desc_en: PJM ​said ​it was ​under a federal alert to cut electricity consumption. It serves 67 million people ⁠in the Mid-Atlantic, South and Washington, D.C., area.
items.desc_zh: PJM ​表示​它正处于联邦政府削减用电量的警报之下。它为大西洋中部、南部和华盛顿特区地区的 6700 万人提供服务。

items.desc_zh: 图斯克表示，在媒体报道俄罗斯计划发动袭击后，波兰正在为“各种”情况做准备。

items.desc_zh: 因出售批评北京的材料而反抗中国的林永基因肺癌去世。

items.desc_en: Deniz Göktaş is regarded as one of Turkey's most popular comedians and is accused of "inciting hatred and hostility" on stage.

items.title_en: Ford achieves quality milestone, as CEO targets flawless new vehicle launches
items.title_zh: 福特实现质量里程碑，首席执行官目标是完美推出新车
items.desc_en: Ford CEO Jim Farley told CNBC that the automaker has learned from its past quality and recall issues, which have hurt its earnings and stained its reputation.
items.desc_zh: 福特首席执行官吉姆·法利 (Jim Farley) 告诉 CNBC，该汽车制造商已经从过去的质量和召回问题中吸取了教训，这些问题损害了其盈利并玷污了其声誉。

items.title_en: American Express and Chase move luxury lounge wars beyond the airport
items.title_zh: 美国运通和大通将豪华休息室大战转移到机场之外
items.desc_en: Credit card companies are increasingly offering access to lounges and perks at festivals and sporting events, often exclusively for premium cardholders.
items.desc_zh: 信用卡公司越来越多地在节日和体育赛事期间提供休息室和福利，通常专门针对高级持卡人。

items.desc_zh: 摩纳哥检察官办公室表示，嫌疑人已不在摩纳哥。

items.title_en: Nasa launches mission to save falling space telescope
items.title_zh: 美国宇航局启动拯救坠落太空望远镜的任务
items.desc_en: A Nasa-funded robot has blasted off to catch a falling telescope in mid-orbit and blast it back to safety before it burns up.
items.desc_zh: 美国宇航局资助的一个机器人已发射升空，以接住中轨坠落的望远镜，并在其燃烧之前将其炸回安全地带。

items.title_en: France records 2,025 excess deaths at peak of heatwave as Europe braces for more extreme weather
items.title_zh: 法国在热浪高峰期超额死亡 2,025 人，欧洲正准备迎接更极端的天气
items.desc_en: Forecasters are warning of further extreme temperatures on the continent in the next few days.
items.desc_zh: 预报员警告未来几天非洲大陆将出现进一步的极端气温。

items.title_en: Oman walks a diplomatic tightrope over Strait of Hormuz fees, creating a ‘blind spot’ for markets
items.title_zh: 阿曼在霍尔木兹海峡收费问题上走外交钢丝，为市场创造了“盲点”
items.desc_en: Oman is using strategic ambiguity as talks over possible Strait of Hormuz fees raise legal, diplomatic and oil market concerns.
items.desc_zh: 由于有关可能的霍尔木兹海峡费用的谈判引发了法律、外交和石油市场的担忧，阿曼正在利用战略模糊性。

items.title_en: President Donald Trump defends business dealings, his children in exclusive interview with CNBC
items.title_zh: 唐纳德·特朗普总统在接受 CNBC 独家采访时为商业交易和他的孩子们辩护
items.desc_en: Trump spoke with CNBC as he prepares to celebrate the 250th birthday of the U.S. on July 4 with an event and fireworks on the National Mall in Washington.
items.desc_zh: 特朗普在接受 CNBC 采访时表示，他准备于 7 月 4 日在华盛顿国家广场举行活动并燃放烟花来庆祝美国 250 岁生日。

items.title_en: 5 takeaways from President Donald Trump's interview with CNBC
items.title_zh: 唐纳德·特朗普总统接受 CNBC 采访的 5 个要点
items.desc_en: The president defended his family's business and said he feels bad that the presidency creates a conflict of interest in any of his children's investments.
items.desc_zh: 总统为其家族企业进行了辩护，并表示，他对总统任期给他孩子的任何投资造成利益冲突感到难过。

items.title_en: AI is 'not smart' so what's next in artificial intelligence?
items.title_zh: 人工智能“不聪明”，那么人工智能的下一步是什么？
items.desc_en: Leading AI researcher Yan LeCun has a start-up which is developing a more flexible AI system.
items.desc_zh: 领先的人工智能研究员严乐存拥有一家初创公司，正在开发更灵活的人工智能系统。

items.title_en: Minnesota joins 'state fair' in D.C., but 250th celebration is muted - MinnPost
items.title_zh: 明尼苏达州参加华盛顿特区的“州博览会”，但 250 周年庆祝活动却悄无声息 - MinnPost
items.desc_en: Minnesota joins 'state fair' in D.C., but 250th celebration is muted  MinnPostTricorn hats or Trump rally? Americans have July Fourth options  CNNOpinion | The Unifying Speech We Won’t Get This Indepe
items.desc_zh: 明尼苏达州参加了在华盛顿举行的“州博览会”，但 250 周年庆典却悄无声息美国人有七月四日的选择我们不会得到如此独立的统一演讲

items.title_en: Meta glasses wearers hit with paywall to use built-in feature
items.title_zh: Meta 眼镜佩戴者需要付费才能使用内置功能
items.desc_en: A feature in Meta's glasses which boosts the voice of people will be capped at three hours for free use.
items.desc_zh: Meta眼镜中的一项增强人们声音的功能将被限制免费使用三个小时。

items.title_en: Google must pay €4.1bn fine for using Android to 'block' rivals
items.title_zh: 谷歌因使用 Android“阻止”竞争对手而须支付 41 亿欧元罚款
items.desc_en: A Google spokesperson said the judgement "fails to recognise" the firm's "significant investment to ensure Android remains open."
items.desc_zh: 谷歌发言人表示，该判决“未能认可”该公司“为确保 Android 保持开放而进行的重大投资”。

items.desc_en: The actor, who died in 2016, appears in the Netflix show with the consent of his estate.
items.desc_zh: 这位于 2016 年去世的演员在得到其遗产管理人的同意后出现在 Netflix 节目中。

items.title_en: PlayStation will stop releasing games on discs in 2028
items.title_zh: PlayStation 将于 2028 年停止发行光盘游戏
items.desc_en: The firm said future games would still be sold in shops, but they would come with a digital code only.
items.desc_zh: 该公司表示，未来的游戏仍将在商店出售，但它们只会附带数字代码。

items.title_en: Ford rehires human engineers after AI fails to match quality checks
items.title_zh: 人工智能未能匹配质量检查后，福特重新雇用人类工程师

items.desc_zh: 该汽车制造商发现人工智能质量检查无法与经验丰富的技术人员的技能相匹配。

items.title_zh: 科技公司将大型设备和游戏机价格上涨归咎于人工智能

items.desc_zh: Xbox 游戏机、任天堂的新 Switch 2 和 Valve 的 Steam Deck 只是近几个月价格上涨的一些小玩意。

items.desc_zh: 音乐和电影现在基本上都是数字化的——《GTA 6》缺少光盘是否意味着游戏也会走同样的路？
